name: claude-bridge-daemon
description: Control-plane daemon for the claude-bridge plugin: peer lifecycle, telemetry, audit. Distributed as opt-in artefact — see ADR-008.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/daemon.cjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --loader:.json=json && mkdir -p templates && cp src/templates/claude-bridge-daemon.service templates/
